title: Better Weapons
description: Adds new weapons, artifacts and structure to our cubic world.
body:
# **Introduction**


We present to your attention a new modification from **GCM Studio (GuildCraftsMen)** under the guidance of player **RusmayXD**, which adds various artifacts, weapons and structures. Let's talk about everything in order!



# **Structures**


In total, there are only **10 structures** in the mod: 9 of them appear in the normal world, and another 1 in the land of ender. Inside each structure there is a chest containing a unique artifact or weapon for your player character, more on these later.

Some structures will be safe, however, there will also be those where you will have to show strength and ingenuity. For example, there is an air structure in the form of a cloud (it consists of a cloud block that was added with this modification), if the player stands on this cloud, it will fall to the ground, also the blocks will cause the air block to “break”, be careful!

We will not go into details of each structure, since we will lose interest in studying the modification, but we can show examples of these dungeons.



# **Weapons**


In this mod, weapons are divided into two types: ordinary and magical, for each type you will receive certain achievements. Let's look at each one.

• **Macuahutl** is a legendary weapon of the Aztecs. Has 6 damage and 0.7 attack speed. It will need to be crafted from four stones and three boards.

• **Khopesh** is a strengthened version of the iron sword. 9 damage and 1 attack speed, has a craft of two iron swords and one ingot of the same material.

• **Idol of the Dead Dux** is the very first weapon that was added to this mod. This is a short range spear that deals 10 damage with an attack speed of 0.7. It cannot be created, it can be found in special structures. If you press RMB while holding the idol, you will gain the ability to run intensely for a certain time. Please note that such weapons can gradually break with each active ability, use wisely.

• **Scythe of Justice** - a weapon of the upper world, coming straight from the abyss, look for a certain structure. Deals only 4 damage per attack, but has a speed of 3 units. RMB to activate stealth mode.

• **The Phoenix Sword** is one of the most powerful weapons in this mod. Deals 10 damage and has an attack speed of 0.8, cannot be created, can only be found. RMB to accept the Phoenix's gift! When you activate this ability, you receive a large number of buffs, including regeneration and maximum fire resistance. The effects are accompanied by new sounds.

• **The Storm Axe** is the most powerful and interesting weapon of this project. Has 10 damage and 07 attack speed. When you activate the ability, you enter spatial movement mode and gain flight for two seconds. Sounds too good? Truly! However, to get this weapon, you will need to find a floating structure in the ender world.

• **Sarkabans** are the only ranged weapon from this mod. They are long tubes for hunting with darts (regular and poisonous). All types of sarcabans and darts can be created and also found while traveling around the world.




# **Artifacts**


In this mod there are only 6 artifacts that can be found in structures. They are divided into two types: **passive and active**:

**Passive artifacts** simply need to be kept in your inventory for them to work (for example, the Anemo artifact, which gives a smooth fall as long as it is in your inventory).

**Active artifacts** must be held in your hand, for example, Athena’s shield, it protects against some negative effects.




# **Other things**


In fashion, we haven't covered **bags and backpacks** yet. There is nothing surprising here: the bags are made from leather and thread. Backpacks are the same, but now with the addition of craft bags. Used for storing and carrying things.

**Cloud is a block** that is only available in the creative menu. It will form an air structure in the ordinary world. If you break it in survival, you can get a bottle of experience.

**The Pipe** is another craftable mod item that can be lit using the right mouse button. When smoking, you get the effect of strength, nausea and a little speed.
